flow.name: prc-list-customers-flow
flow.doc:name: PRC List Customers Flow
flow.doc:description: Delegates to customer-sys-api and returns all customers

http:listener.doc:name: GET /customers
http:listener.doc:description: Inbound REST call to list all customers

http:request.doc:name: GET customers → sys API
http:request.doc:description: Calls customer-sys-api to retrieve all customers

set-variable.doc:name: Capture status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores response status from customer-sys-api

flow.name: prc-get-customer-flow
flow.doc:name: PRC Get Customer Flow
flow.doc:description: Delegates to customer-sys-api and returns a single customer or 404

http:listener.doc:name: GET /customers/{customerId}
http:listener.doc:description: Inbound REST call to get a customer by ID

set-variable.doc:name: Store customerId
set-variable.doc:description: Captures customerId URI param

http:request.doc:name: GET customer → sys API
http:request.doc:description: Calls customer-sys-api to get customer by ID

set-variable.doc:name: Capture status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores response status from customer-sys-api

flow.name: prc-get-customer-orders-flow
flow.doc:name: PRC Get Customer Orders Flow
flow.doc:description: Retrieves all orders for a customer by calling orders-sys-api filtered by customerId

http:listener.doc:name: GET /customers/{customerId}/orders
http:listener.doc:description: Inbound REST call to list a customer's orders

set-variable.doc:name: Store customerId
set-variable.doc:description: Captures customerId URI param for filtering

set-variable.doc:name: Capture status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores response status from orders-sys-api

flow.name: prc-get-customer-order-flow
flow.doc:name: PRC Get Customer Order Flow
flow.doc:description: Retrieves a specific order and validates ownership — 404 if not found or belongs to different customer

http:listener.doc:name: GET /customers/{customerId}/orders/{orderId}
http:listener.doc:description: Inbound REST call to get a specific order scoped to a customer

set-variable.doc:name: Store customerId
set-variable.doc:description: Captures customerId URI param for ownership validation

set-variable.doc:name: Store orderId
set-variable.doc:description: Captures orderId URI param

http:request.doc:name: GET order → sys API
http:request.doc:description: Calls orders-sys-api to retrieve the order by ID

set-variable.doc:name: Capture sys status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores the orders-sys-api response status for routing

choice.doc:name: Order found + owned by customer?
choice.doc:description: Checks order existence and customer ownership

set-variable.doc:name: Set 404
set-variable.doc:description: Order does not exist

ee:transform.doc:name: 404 body
ee:transform.doc:description: JSON 404 error response for missing order

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- {error: "Not Found", message: "Order '" ++ vars.orderId ++ "' was not found", statusCode: 404}

when.doc:name: Wrong customer
when.doc:description: Order exists but owned by a different customer

set-variable.doc:name: Set 404
set-variable.doc:description: Ownership mismatch — return 404 to avoid data leakage

ee:transform.doc:name: Ownership 404 body
ee:transform.doc:description: JSON 404 response for order not belonging to this customer

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- {error: "Not Found", message: "Order '" ++ vars.orderId ++ "' not found for customer '" ++ vars.customerId ++ "'", statusCode: 404}

otherwise.doc:name: Valid — return order
otherwise.doc:description: Order found and owned by the correct customer

set-variable.doc:name: Set 200
set-variable.doc:description: Ownership verified, return 200

flow.name: prc-create-customer-flow
flow.doc:name: PRC Create Customer Flow
flow.doc:description: Delegates customer creation to customer-sys-api and returns 201 Created

http:listener.doc:name: POST /customers
http:listener.doc:description: Inbound REST call to create a new customer

http:request.doc:name: POST customer → sys API
http:request.doc:description: Calls customer-sys-api to persist the new customer

set-variable.doc:name: Capture status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores response status from customer-sys-api

flow.name: prc-update-customer-flow
flow.doc:name: PRC Update Customer Flow
flow.doc:description: Delegates customer update to customer-sys-api and returns updated resource or 404

http:listener.doc:name: PUT /customers/{customerId}
http:listener.doc:description: Inbound REST call to update an existing customer

set-variable.doc:name: Store customerId
set-variable.doc:description: Captures customerId URI param

http:request.doc:name: PUT customer → sys API
http:request.doc:description: Calls customer-sys-api to update the customer by ID

set-variable.doc:name: Capture status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores response status from customer-sys-api

flow.name: prc-delete-customer-flow
flow.doc:name: PRC Delete Customer Flow
flow.doc:description: Business rule: checks for existing orders first. Returns 409 Conflict if orders exist; otherwise delegates deletion to customer-sys-api.

http:listener.doc:name: DELETE /customers/{customerId}
http:listener.doc:description: Inbound REST call to delete a customer — enforces no-active-orders business rule

set-variable.doc:name: Store customerId
set-variable.doc:description: Captures customerId URI param for order check and delete call

http:request.doc:name: Check existing orders for customer
http:request.doc:description: Calls orders-sys-api to verify whether this customer has any orders before allowing deletion

choice.doc:name: Has existing orders?
choice.doc:description: Business rule gate: cannot delete customer if orders exist

when.doc:name: Orders exist — reject
when.doc:description: Customer has orders attached, deletion is not allowed

set-variable.doc:name: Set 409 Conflict
set-variable.doc:description: Sets HTTP response to 409 Conflict — customer has linked orders

ee:transform.doc:name: Build 409 conflict body
ee:transform.doc:description: Constructs a JSON 409 error explaining the customer cannot be deleted while orders exist

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { error: "Conflict", message: "Customer '" ++ vars.customerId ++ "' cannot be deleted because they have " ++ (sizeOf(payload) as String) ++ " existing order(s). Delete all orders first.", statusCode: 409, orderCount: sizeOf(payload) }

otherwise.doc:name: No orders — proceed with delete
otherwise.doc:description: Customer has no orders, safe to delegate deletion to system API

http:request.doc:name: DELETE customer → sys API
http:request.doc:description: Calls customer-sys-api to delete the customer after confirming no orders exist

set-variable.doc:name: Capture status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores response status from customer-sys-api delete operation

logger.doc:description: Logs delete result including business rule outcome

flow.name: prc-create-customer-order-flow
flow.doc:name: PRC Create Customer Order Flow
flow.doc:description: Validates customer exists, then creates a new order attached to that customer via orders-sys-api

http:listener.doc:name: POST /customers/{customerId}/orders
http:listener.doc:description: Inbound REST call to create a new order for a specific customer

set-variable.doc:name: Store customerId
set-variable.doc:description: Captures customerId from URI for customer validation and order creation

set-variable.doc:name: Store order payload
set-variable.doc:description: Preserves the incoming order request body before making the customer validation call

http:request.doc:name: Validate customer exists
http:request.doc:description: Calls customer-sys-api to verify the target customer exists before creating the order

set-variable.doc:name: Capture customer check status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores the customer lookup response status for routing

choice.doc:name: Customer found?
choice.doc:description: Routes based on whether the target customer exists

when.doc:name: Customer not found — reject
when.doc:description: Cannot create an order for a non-existent customer

set-variable.doc:name: Set 404
set-variable.doc:description: Target customer does not exist

ee:transform.doc:name: 404 customer not found
ee:transform.doc:description: JSON 404 error response when the target customer for the order does not exist

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- {error: "Not Found", message: "Customer '" ++ vars.customerId ++ "' was not found. Cannot create order.", statusCode: 404}

otherwise.doc:name: Customer exists — create order
otherwise.doc:description: Customer validated, proceed to create the order in orders-sys-api

ee:transform.doc:name: Inject customerId into order body
ee:transform.doc:description: Merges the URI customerId into the order request payload before forwarding to orders-sys-api

http:request.doc:name: POST order → sys API
http:request.doc:description: Calls orders-sys-api to create the new order with the customerId injected

set-variable.doc:name: Capture status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores response status from orders-sys-api

flow.name: prc-update-customer-order-flow
flow.doc:name: PRC Update Customer Order Flow
flow.doc:description: Validates order ownership before delegating update to orders-sys-api

http:listener.doc:name: PUT /customers/{customerId}/orders/{orderId}
http:listener.doc:description: Inbound REST call to update an order scoped to a customer

set-variable.doc:name: Store customerId
set-variable.doc:description: Captures customerId for ownership validation

set-variable.doc:name: Store orderId
set-variable.doc:description: Captures orderId URI param

set-variable.doc:name: Store update payload
set-variable.doc:description: Preserves the incoming update body before ownership check

http:request.doc:name: Fetch order for ownership check
http:request.doc:description: Retrieves the order to verify it belongs to the specified customer before updating

set-variable.doc:name: Capture order check status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores orders-sys-api response status for ownership routing

choice.doc:name: Order found + owned?
choice.doc:description: Validates order exists and belongs to this customer before applying update

when.doc:name: Not found or wrong customer
when.doc:description: Order does not exist or does not belong to this customer

set-variable.doc:name: Set 404
set-variable.doc:description: Order not found or ownership mismatch

ee:transform.doc:name: 404 body
ee:transform.doc:description: JSON 404 error for order not found or not owned by customer

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- {error: "Not Found", message: "Order '" ++ vars.orderId ++ "' not found for customer '" ++ vars.customerId ++ "'", statusCode: 404}

otherwise.doc:name: Valid — delegate update
otherwise.doc:description: Order exists and is owned by the correct customer, proceed with update

set-payload.doc:name: Restore update payload
set-payload.doc:description: Restores the original update body to send to orders-sys-api

http:request.doc:name: PUT order → sys API
http:request.doc:description: Calls orders-sys-api to apply the update to the order

set-variable.doc:name: Capture status
set-variable.doc:description: Stores response status from orders-sys-api update
